steps.description: Click on the "Apps for Microsoft 365" option in the dropdown menu within the "New Project" dialog under the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit interface.
Click on the "General Teams Agent" option within the dropdown menu labeled "Teams Agent or App Using Microsoft Teams SDK" in the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit interface at coordinates (321, 218).
Click the "Simple Bot" option from the dropdown menu under "Teams Capability," which represents a simple implementation of an echo bot ready for customization.
Click on the "JavaScript" option in the "Programming Language" dropdown menu within the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit interface at coordinates (288, 101).
Click the "Default folder" field in the "Workspace Folder" dialog to select the path "/home/vscode/AgentsToolkitProjects".
Click on the "config.js" file in the Explorer panel of Visual Studio Code to select or open it.
Click the "Close (Ctrl+W)" tab button in Visual Studio Code to close the "config.js" file.
